summary: v2.6d.2 FINAL/v1.0 — FULL E2E REGRESSION COMPLETE. Backend: 143/143 pytest pass (137 prior + 6 new date-filter tests added to test_admin_v26d.py::TestAdminDateFilter). All 5 routes load + render correctly (/?order=1 4-step wizard, /?admin=1 PIN-gated dashboard, /?trip+driver SOP page, /?track customer tracking with PoD card+checkpoints, /?bastk Truck Box sketch + QR Verifikasi panel showing BASTK/202606/ODDEMO + PDF download). Admin date-range filter (DARI/SAMPAI) fully verified: empty params behave as no-filter, past date_to returns empty state, bad formats (2026-99-99, garbage) don't crash, HTML5 min/max attrs prevent invalid combos, Reset filter button appears when any of (search/status/dateFrom/dateTo) set and clears all 4 simultaneously, CSV export mirrors same filter logic. Mobile 375x812 responsive: stat tiles wrap 2-col, filter row wraps cleanly, DARI/SAMPAI inputs remain usable. Empty/error states confirmed: /?admin=1 with q=ZZZNOMATCH shows adm-empty, /?bastk=NONEXISTENT shows bk-error 'Link tidak lengkap', /?track=NONEXISTENT shows not-found, wrong PIN shows adm-pin-err. /api/odoo/ping returns {enabled:false, reason:'missing ODOO_URL/DB/USER/KEY env vars'} — correct for v1.0. NO REGRESSIONS. v1.0 PRODUCTION-READY.

minor.issue: Bad formats (2026-99-99, garbage) silently fall back to no-date-filter rather than 400. Handled gracefully (no crash) but no validation feedback. Acceptable for v1.0; HTML5 min/max attrs on the frontend prevent this combo from the UI.

issues: Renders cleanly: 6 stat tiles wrap to 2-col, DARI/SAMPAI date inputs wrap below search+status select, order card action buttons (Mark On-Trip, Driver, Track, BASTK, Batal) wrap to 2 rows. No overflow, no contrast issues. Navy+gold theme consistent.

action_items: (OPTIONAL/POST-v1.0) Consider returning HTTP 400 for malformed date_from/date_to params instead of silent fallback — currently lexicographic-compare on 'notadate' just no-ops and returns full list. UX risk is low because HTML5 date pickers on frontend prevent invalid input from UI; only direct API curl-fiddling triggers the silent fallback.

(POST-v1.0) Configure ODOO_URL/DB/USER/KEY in production env to enable Odoo XML-RPC sync. /api/odoo/ping currently reports enabled:false which is correct for v1.0 scope but production deploy will need this resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: _admin_orders_filter (server.py:906-946) shared between /admin/orders and /admin/orders/export.csv — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH, no duplication. Date filter uses ISO lexicographic compare on created_at field which is safe (ISO 8601 sorts chronologically as string). Inclusive end-of-day on date_to via '$lt' + 'T23:59:59.999' — correct (anything strictly less than next-day-midnight equivalent).
Length check (len(df) == 10) gracefully drops malformed dates without crashing the query — defensive, good. Trade-off: silent fallback (no 400). Acceptable for v1.0.

Frontend AdminDashboard.jsx (480 lines): date inputs bind dateFrom→max=dateTo and dateTo→min=dateFrom, which uses HTML5 to block invalid combos at the UI level — clean UX. useEffect dependency array [headers, statusFilter, search, dateFrom, dateTo] correctly re-fetches on any filter change. Reset button conditionally rendered on (search || statusFilter || dateFrom || dateTo) — covers all 4 filters.
CSV export limit clamp 1..20000 prevents memory blowout; uses BOM + UTF-8 for Excel compatibility. Trip uj batch-loaded via {$in:[trip_ids]} — efficient (no N+1 query).
All v2.6d data-testid coverage maintained (adm-date-from, adm-date-to, adm-filter-reset, adm-empty all stable). Backwards-compatible with prior iteration_11 tests.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_v26d.py (added class TestAdminDateFilter with 6 new tests at end of file)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (PIN gate, 6 stat tiles, search empty state, status filter, date range DARI/SAMPAI, Reset filter clears all 4, mobile 375 responsive, /?order /?track /?bastk /?driver all render, error states for NONEXISTENT trip IDs all working)

test_credentials: ADMIN_PIN=0000 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Demo trip TRIP-POD-DEMO. 3 demo NEW orders pre-seeded (TEST_Customer Convert variants visible).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_E2E_Wizard order via POST /api/orders, then CANCELLED via PATCH /api/admin/orders to keep counts clean. seed_orders fixture inside test_admin_v26d.py reuses TEST_AdminBob/Cindy/David pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v1.0 FEATURE FREEZE in effect — no more new features. Pytest baseline = 143 (137 prior + 6 new TestAdminDateFilter). The 6 new date filter tests require seed_orders fixture which is module-scoped at top of test_admin_v26d.py. Date range filter logic: server.py:_admin_orders_filter() — shared by /admin/orders and /admin/orders/export.csv. Front-end: AdminDashboard.jsx lines 111-135 (state + fetch) and 244-261 (DOM). Mobile responsive verified at 375x812 — stat tiles wrap 2-col, filter row wraps with DARI/SAMPAI date inputs flowing below search. No regressions in any of the 5 routes. /api/odoo/ping correctly returns enabled:false for v1.0 (Odoo XML-RPC env vars empty by design — production deploy needs config).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Single nit: malformed date_from/date_to (e.g. '2026-99-99') falls back silently to no-filter rather than returning 400. RCA: server.py:906-946 _admin_orders_filter uses length check (len(df) == 10) as the only validation; non-numeric strings of length 10 (e.g. 'notadate-x') would still pass the length test and rely on Mongo's lexicographic compare to no-op. Mitigation: HTML5 date input attrs on frontend prevent this combo from UI; only direct API curl-fiddling exposes the silent fallback. NON-BLOCKING for v1.0.
